name: spotify-create-playlist
description: Create a new Spotify playlist. Use when asked to 'create a playlist', 'make a new playlist', 'build a playlist called X'. Returns the new playlist object including its id, which is needed to add tracks. Playlists are private by default.

input.description: name is the playlist title (required). description is optional text shown in Spotify. public controls visibility (default false = private).

description.description: Optional playlist description shown in Spotify

output.description: New playlist object with id (use this to add tracks), name, uri, and external_urls.spotify link.

usage: POST /proxy/me/playlists {name, description?, public?} → playlist object with id
